common.workspaceUnavailableDescription: Workspace is not ready yet. Refresh the page or select another workspace.

actions.normalized: Topbar actions share consistent height and alignment.

language.label: Language
language.helper: Interface language is saved on this device.
language.title: Interface language
language.description: Choose the Sellora interface language. API values and database statuses are not changed.

auth.helper: Enter your account details to access the store.
auth.error: Invalid email or password. Check the details and try again.
auth.sessionExpired: Session expired. Please log in again.
auth.networkError: Could not connect to the server. Try again a bit later.
auth.invalidCredentials: Invalid email or password. Check the details and try again.
auth.contextTitle: All store work in one workspace
auth.contextDescription: Sellora brings sales, customers, products, shipments, ads, and finance into one protected workspace for your team.
auth.trustStatement: Access is protected by an account, and each store’s data is kept separately.

landing.headline: Run your Instagram store without spreadsheets and chaos
landing.subtitle: Leads, customers, orders, products, stock, shipments, ads, and profit — in one modern workspace.

preview.ariaLabel: Demo preview of the Sellora interface

landing.workflowTitle: From Instagram message to repeat purchase
landing.workflowSubtitle: Sellora helps the team track every step: first request, payment, shipment, profit, and the next purchase.

workflow.title: Instagram request
workflow.description: Capture a new request without losing the conversation.

workflow.title: Lead
workflow.description: Assign the request and track the status.

workflow.title: Customer
workflow.description: Keep contacts, notes, and purchase history.

workflow.title: Repeat sale
workflow.description: Return to customers with the right context.

capabilities.title: Everything an Instagram store needs in one place
capabilities.description: Each module solves a daily operational job without technical noise.

items.title: Leads and customers
items.description: Turn Direct requests into customer records and repeat sales.

items.title: Orders
items.description: Control status, payment, products, and the responsible manager.

items.title: Products and stock
items.description: See stock, reservations, variants, SKU, and low inventory.

items.title: Nova Poshta
items.description: Prepare delivery data for future synchronization.

items.title: Advertising
items.description: Compare spend, leads, orders, ROAS, CPA, and CPL.

items.title: Finance and reports
items.description: Understand revenue, costs, margin, and net profit.

integrations.title: Only truthful integration statuses
integrations.description: The public page does not promise connections that are not available in the product yet.

items.title: Nova Poshta
items.description: Delivery module prepared with TTN and directories for pilot use.

items.title: Meta Ads
items.description: Ad analytics are evolving in stages; full integration is marked as upcoming.

items.title: Instagram Direct
items.description: Direct connection is not presented as active without an available official flow.

landing.ctaTitle: Start from your real Sellora workspace
landing.ctaSubtitle: If you already have workspace access, log in and keep managing sales without spreadsheets.
landing.footerDescription: Sellora helps Instagram stores manage leads, customers, orders, stock, shipments, advertising, and finance in one workspace.

dashboard.title: CRM for Instagram stores
dashboard.subtitle: Leads, customers, orders, inventory, shipments, advertising, finance, and analytics in one modern SaaS interface.

logistics.title: Logistics health
logistics.subtitle: Current shipment counters; delivered today and returned this month use calendar periods.

advertising.title: Advertising performance
advertising.ownerSubtitle: Evaluate spend, orders, and ad return for the selected period.
advertising.emptyTitle: No advertising data in the selected period yet.
advertising.emptyDescription: Add ad metrics manually or import CSV to see ROAS and CPA.

recentOrders.title: Recent orders
recentOrders.subtitle: Latest created orders regardless of selected period, so period KPI values are not confused with history.

topProducts.title: Top products
topProducts.subtitle: Best performers by revenue in the selected period.

charts.salesProfitSubtitle: Revenue and net profit for the selected period.
charts.orderFunnelSubtitle: Real order distribution for the selected period.

topCategories.title: Top categories
topCategories.subtitle: Category revenue share from real order items.

inventoryAlerts.title: Inventory alerts
inventoryAlerts.subtitle: Low-stock and out-of-stock products that need attention.
inventoryAlerts.emptyDescription: Add products or import a catalog to see stock and alerts.

tooltips.revenue: Revenue follows the existing analytics service totals for the selected period.
tooltips.netProfit: Net profit = revenue − product cost − ads − shipping − other costs.
tooltips.orders: Orders created in the selected period.
tooltips.newLeads: Leads created in the selected period.
tooltips.roas: ROAS shows how much revenue ads generated for each unit of ad spend.

emptyStates.noSalesTrendDescription: Create orders or import historical data to see revenue and profit dynamics here.
emptyStates.noOrdersInPeriodDescription: Change the period or create/import orders to see the funnel.
emptyStates.noTopProductsDescription: Product performance will appear after orders are created or imported.
emptyStates.noCategoriesDescription: Category performance appears after orders with catalog items exist.
emptyStates.noRecentOrdersDescription: Create your first order or import historical data to start tracking revenue and fulfillment.
emptyStates.noActivity: No recent activity in this period

errors.loadFailed: Dashboard data could not be loaded. Refresh the page or retry after checking the current workspace connection.

dashboard.periodHelper: Metrics are calculated for the selected period: {period}. If there were no orders in this period, KPI values may be zero.

ownerContext.question: What needs attention today?
ownerContext.abbreviations: ROAS — ad return · CPA — cost per order · AOV — average order value.

kpiHelpers.ordersZero: No orders in the selected period yet.
kpiHelpers.revenueZero: Revenue appears after paid or completed orders.
kpiHelpers.profitMissing: Not enough data to calculate profit. Check product costs.
kpiHelpers.profitRestricted: Profit is available to owners or analysts.
kpiHelpers.roasHasData: ROAS shows ad return for the selected period.
kpiHelpers.roasMissing: Add ad spend to see advertising return.

ownerAlerts.title: What needs attention
ownerAlerts.subtitle: Actions are computed from this workspace data, without fake insights.
ownerAlerts.allClear: No critical actions right now. Check leads, orders, or ad metrics to grow.

lowStock.title: Low stock: {count}
lowStock.description: Restock products to avoid missed sales.

profitMissing.title: Not enough profit data
profitMissing.description: Some sales may be missing costs, expenses, or ad data.

noAds.title: No advertising data yet
noAds.description: Add ad metrics manually or import CSV to see ROAS and CPA.

noPeriodData.title: No data in selected period
noPeriodData.description: Create a lead or order to make the dashboard useful.

funnel.title: Sales funnel
funnel.subtitle: Shows the path from request to delivered order for the selected period.
funnel.noRate: Not enough data for a rate.
funnel.emptyTitle: Not enough data for the funnel
funnel.emptyDescription: Create leads and orders to see conversion.

fulfillment.title: Order fulfillment state
fulfillment.subtitle: Shows what needs confirmation, shipment, or review.
fulfillment.confirmedHelp: Confirmed orders should move to shipment.

finance.title: Finance and profit
finance.subtitle: Revenue, net profit, and average order value for the selected period.
finance.profitMissing: Profit is not calculated yet. Check product costs, expenses, and ad data.
finance.profitHelp: Net profit includes revenue, product cost, ads, shipping, and other expenses.

leads.title: Leads
leads.subtitle: Manage requests, statuses, and customer conversion.
leads.searchPlaceholder: Search leads by name, phone, Instagram or notes
leads.campaignHelp: Optional. Choose a campaign if this lead came from a specific ad.
leads.emptyDescription: Add the first Instagram Direct request or create a lead manually.
leads.filteredEmptyDescription: Change search, status, or source to find the request.
leads.sourceWarning: Unable to load lead sources. You can still create a lead without a source.
leads.createHelp: Only the name is required. Phone, Instagram, source, and notes can be added now or later.
leads.archiveConvertedDescription: This lead is converted. Archiving it will not delete the customer or order.
leads.archiveDescription: This lead will be hidden from active lists. History remains available.
leads.nextActionCreateOrder: Confirm the need and create an order
leads.nextActionContact: Contact the customer and qualify the request
leads.nextActionConverted: Check the linked customer or order
leads.nextActionLost: Review the loss reason before follow-up
leads.apiSessionExpired: Session expired. Please log in again.
leads.apiForbidden: You do not have permission to manage leads.
leads.apiCreateFailed: Unable to create lead. Please try again.
leads.apiLoadFailed: Unable to load leads. Please try again.
leads.drawerActivityUnavailable: Activity history is unavailable in the current API.

customers.title: Customers
customers.subtitle: A single customer base with notes, tags, addresses, and order history.
customers.searchPlaceholder: Search customers by name, phone, Instagram or email
customers.selectPrompt: Select a customer to manage CRM details.
customers.name: Name
customers.quickCreateSuccess: Customer created and selected for the order.
customers.quickCreateError: Unable to create customer. Check the details and try again.
customers.quickCreatePhoneRequired: Enter the customer phone for delivery.
customers.emptyDescription: Customers appear after leads or orders. You can also add one manually.
customers.filteredEmptyDescription: Change search or reset filters to see all customers.
customers.createDescription: Add a buyer to create repeat orders faster and keep contacts in one place.
customers.archiveDescription: The profile will be hidden from active CRM lists. Historical orders and shipments stay unchanged.
customers.createFailed: Unable to create customer. Please try again.
customers.saveFailed: Unable to save customer changes. Please try again.
customers.deleteFailed: Unable to archive customer. Please try again.
customers.ordersUnavailable: Customer orders are unavailable in the current API.

orders.title: Orders
orders.subtitle: Create orders and track payment, profit, and delivery statuses.

productOption.noProducts: No products match this category and search.

orders.searchPlaceholder: Search by order, customer, item, SKU or notes
orders.selectPrompt: Select an order to view details, status history, and profit.
orders.createDescription: Reserve inventory, add costs, and keep profit totals in the same mobile-safe modal style.
orders.editDescription: Order items can be edited while the order is NEW or CONFIRMED.
orders.updateError: Please check the order items and costs.
orders.archiveDescription: Only NEW or CANCELLED orders can be archived. Reservations are released when needed.

pagination.emptyDescription: Create your first order to track payment, shipment and profit in Sellora.
pagination.filteredEmptyDescription: Try changing search, status, payment status or sorting to find the order.

orders.customerSelectorHelp: Select an existing customer or create a new one before creating the order.
orders.customerRequired: Select or create a customer before creating the order.
orders.customerSearchPlaceholder: Search customer by name, phone, or Instagram
orders.customerSearchEmpty: No customers found. Try another search or add a new customer.
orders.campaignHelp: Optional. Helps understand which ad brought this order.
orders.coreFlowHint: Fast path: choose a customer, add a product, check payment, and continue to delivery.
orders.profitNotCalculated: Profit is not calculated yet because product costs or expenses are missing.
orders.shipmentMissing: Shipment has not been created yet.

products.title: Products
products.subtitle: Product catalog, variants, SKU, prices, and unit costs.
products.createDescription: Add the base catalog record first, then attach variants with SKU, price, and stock.
products.variantsDescription: Use each row action to edit variant SKU, color, size, price, barcode, and status.
products.createProductVariantFirst: Create a product first before adding variants.
products.emptyDescription: Create products and variants to prepare the catalog for orders.
products.stockUnavailable: Stock data is unavailable for this product.
products.historyUnavailable: Product history is unavailable in the current API.
products.archiveDescription: Archiving this product hides it from the active catalog. Existing orders remain unchanged.
products.archiveVariantDescription: This variant will be hidden from active selectors. Inventory is not hard deleted, and historical order items remain unchanged.
products.createFailed: Unable to create product. Please try again.
products.createVariantFailed: Unable to create variant. Please try again.
products.saveFailed: Unable to save product changes. Please try again.
products.saveVariantFailed: Unable to save variant changes. Please try again.
products.deleteFailed: Unable to delete record. Please try again.
products.variantInUse: This record cannot be deleted because it is used by other records.

inventory.title: Inventory
inventory.subtitle: Control stock, reservations, minimum levels, and transaction history.
inventory.searchPlaceholder: Search product, SKU or variant SKU
inventory.filteredEmptyTitle: No stock items match these filters.
inventory.filteredEmptyDescription: Try changing search, category, low-stock or sorting filters.
inventory.updateError: Unable to save inventory changes. Please try again.

shipments.title: Shipments
shipments.subtitle: Manage TTNs, cities, warehouses, COD, and delivery statuses.
shipments.heroSubtitle: Create TTN records manually, track delivery lifecycle, and keep order statuses in sync.
shipments.selectPrompt: Select a shipment to view details and status actions.
shipments.manualDescription: Manual shipment entry remains available; Nova Poshta fields are optional until TTN creation.
shipments.archiveNpDescription: This only archives the Sellora shipment record. It does not cancel the Nova Poshta TTN.
shipments.archiveDescription: This shipment will be hidden from active logistics lists. The related order remains unchanged.
shipments.trackingRequired: Tracking number is required for non-draft shipments.
shipments.orderCustomerMissing: Cannot create shipment: order does not have a customer. Select a customer on the order and try again.
shipments.ttnCopyFailed: Unable to copy TTN. Copy the number manually.
shipments.ttnPrintUnavailable: TTN printing is not connected yet.
shipments.ttnPrintWorkaround: Copy the TTN number and use it in the Nova Poshta account.
shipments.orderCustomerMissingUpdate: Cannot create or update shipment: order does not have a customer.
shipments.createTtnReadinessHint: Before creating a TTN, check customer, recipient, city, warehouse, and sender settings.
shipments.searchPlaceholder: Search by TTN, order, customer, phone, city, or warehouse
shipments.updateError: Unable to save shipment changes. Please try again.
shipments.duplicateTtnWarning: TTN is already created for this shipment.

pagination.emptyDescription: Create the first shipment from an order to track TTN and delivery.
pagination.filteredEmptyDescription: Try changing search, status, carrier, or TTN state.

shipments.createTtnIncomplete: Nova Poshta returned an incomplete response. Check the Nova Poshta account before trying again.

advertising.title: Advertising
advertising.subtitle: Track spend, messages, campaigns, and ROAS without connecting ad accounts.
advertising.manualImportFirst: The MVP uses manual import or manual daily metrics entry. Meta Ads API is not active yet.
advertising.futureMetaSync: Future Meta Ads sync will map campaign/adset/ad identifiers without mixing fake API data into manual/import data.
advertising.formulaSafety: ROAS, CPA, CPL, ROI, and conversion metrics use safe formulas: when a denominator is zero, the UI shows “—”, not NaN or Infinity.
advertising.mappingHint: External campaign/adset/ad IDs will appear in details after safe Meta Ads sync is added.
advertising.importMetricsFirst: Import advertising metrics first to see ROAS, CPA, and CPL.
advertising.roasExplanation: ROAS shows how much revenue 1 UAH of ad spend brings.
advertising.cpaExplanation: CPA shows the average cost of one advertising-driven order.
advertising.cplExplanation: CPL shows the average cost of one lead.
advertising.attributionOptional: Campaign attribution for leads and orders remains optional; manual import is the primary MVP source.
advertising.filteredEmpty: If the selected period has no data, adjust the dates or import synthetic advertising metrics.
advertising.insightsSubtitle: Compare campaigns by spend, leads, orders, and profitability so you can quickly decide whether to scale, watch, or pause.
advertising.decisionGoodMessage: The campaign brings strong revenue compared with spend.
advertising.decisionWatchLeadsNoOrders: Leads exist, but orders have not appeared yet.
advertising.decisionProblemSpendNoOrders: There is spend, but no orders.
advertising.decisionWatchHighCpa: Cost per order is above the average.
advertising.decisionNoDataMessage: Not enough advertising data to make a decision.
advertising.decisionDefaultWatch: Metrics exist, but review the campaign before scaling.
advertising.roasShortExplanation: How much revenue 1 UAH of ad spend generated.
advertising.conversionRateShortExplanation: What share of leads became orders.
advertising.manualImportInsightSource: Insights use only manual or CSV-imported advertising metrics.
advertising.metaFutureWorkInsight: Meta Ads API sync remains future work, not an active integration.
advertising.noMisleadingInsight: When spend or enough events are missing, Sellora shows a safe status instead of a scaling recommendation.
advertising.stagingBlockedInsight: Advertising import is not marked pilot-ready while manual staging QA remains blocked.
advertising.noCampaignInsights: There is not enough advertising data to compare campaigns yet.
advertising.decisionProblemLeadsNoOrders: Leads exist, but there are no orders — check Direct follow-up or the offer.
advertising.decisionWatchWeakConversion: Leads and orders exist, but conversion is below the expected level.
advertising.noDataVisibilityHint: Campaigns without metrics appear in comparison as “Not enough data”, but are excluded from Top Campaigns.
advertising.ownerReportSubtitle: Understand which campaigns are worth keeping, reviewing, or stopping based on manual or CSV-imported metrics.
advertising.manualAttributionRules: Attribution is manual: Sellora counts only leads and orders where a campaign was selected manually.
advertising.manualAttributionLinkedOnly: Sellora counts only orders where an advertising campaign was selected manually.
advertising.manualAttributionUnattributedValid: Orders without a campaign remain valid and are not treated as errors.
advertising.manualAttributionMetaFuture: Meta Ads API attribution is future work and is not active now.
advertising.readinessDescription: This block helps the owner and QA team see what works now and what still needs final runtime/staging validation. It does not mean production-ready status.
advertising.readinessPendingPostgresMigration: PostgreSQL runtime validation for the attribution migration
advertising.readinessPendingBrowserMobileQa: browser/mobile QA for leads, orders, and advertising
advertising.safeZeroDenominator: Shown as unavailable when spend is missing or zero.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.subtitle: Financial, advertising, and operational Sellora metrics.
analytics.comingSoon: Detailed analytics will arrive in the next sprint.

reports.title: Analytics & reports
reports.subtitle: Formula-backed reports for sales, products, advertising, customers, inventory and deterministic business insights.

sales.title: Sales report
sales.subtitle: Revenue, orders, AOV, margin, returns and status/payment breakdowns for the selected period.

products.title: Product & category report
products.subtitle: Top products, category share, current stock and low-stock best sellers from the same formulas used on the dashboard.

advertising.title: Advertising report
advertising.subtitle: Manual/imported ad spend, revenue, ROAS, CPA and CPL with safe unavailable states.

customers.title: Customer report
customers.subtitle: Repeat customer health, average spend and recent high-value customers.

inventory.title: Inventory report
inventory.subtitle: Stock risks, reserved/incoming quantities and sales context for low-stock items.

insights.title: Business insights
insights.subtitle: Deterministic rules from existing orders, ads, leads and inventory data — no AI or fake events.
insights.lowStockDescription: {count} product variants are at or below the minimum stock threshold.
insights.adSpendNoOrdersDescription: Advertising spend exists for this period, but no orders were recorded from ads.
insights.lowRoasDescription: Advertising revenue is lower than spend, so the campaign mix may not be paying back.
insights.leadsNoOrdersDescription: Leads exist in the period, but no orders were created in the same period.
insights.healthyDescription: Core sales, advertising and inventory checks do not show urgent warnings for this period.

tooltips.revenue: Revenue includes NEW, CONFIRMED, SHIPPED, DELIVERED and COMPLETED orders; CANCELLED and RETURNED are excluded.
tooltips.netProfit: Net profit = revenue − product cost − ads − shipping − COD fees − other costs.
tooltips.aov: AOV = revenue / included orders. It is unavailable when there are no included orders.
tooltips.roas: ROAS = ad revenue / ad spend. It is unavailable when spend is zero.
tooltips.cpa: CPA = ad spend / ad orders. It is unavailable when orders are zero.
tooltips.cpl: CPL = ad spend / ad leads. It is unavailable when leads are zero.
tooltips.returnRate: Return rate = returned orders / shipped, delivered, completed or returned orders.
tooltips.repeatCustomerRate: Repeat customer rate = customers with 2+ orders / customers with orders.
tooltips.lowStock: Low stock means stock quantity is less than or equal to minimum quantity.
tooltips.reservedStock: Reserved stock is quantity held for open orders.
tooltips.conversionRate: Lead conversion = converted leads / total leads in the selected period.

emptyStates.noSales: No sales rows in this period
emptyStates.noSalesDescription: Create or import orders to populate the sales report.
emptyStates.noProductsDescription: Product and category reports appear after order items exist in the selected period.
emptyStates.noAdvertising: No advertising metrics in this period
emptyStates.noAdvertisingDescription: Add manual campaign metrics or import advertising history.
emptyStates.noCustomersDescription: Customer analytics appears after customers and orders are created or imported.
emptyStates.noInventoryAlertsDescription: No low-stock rows require action right now.

errors.loadFailed: Analytics reports could not be loaded. Check workspace access and retry.

filters.periodHelp: Dashboard and reports share this period so metrics stay consistent.

pagination.emptyTitle: No report rows for this period
pagination.emptyDescription: Change the period or add orders to populate detailed analytics.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your store, team, integrations and Sellora preferences
settings.currencyHelp: Currency controls how financial values are displayed across Sellora. It does not convert historical amounts.
settings.ownerOnly: Only the owner can change settings

cards.importDescription: Upload Excel or CSV files, preview rows, validate mappings, and import historical data.
cards.integrationsDescription: Connect delivery and external services such as Nova Poshta.
cards.novaDescription: Configure Nova Poshta credentials, sender settings, cities, warehouses, and TTN creation.
cards.feedbackDescription: Review issue reports, ideas and confusion signals from pilot users.
cards.workspaceDescription: Name, slug, currency and timezone for the workspace.
cards.teamDescription: Users, OWNER/MANAGER/ANALYST roles and access state.

settings.label: Sellora Settings
settings.integrationsSubtitle: Configure delivery integrations for this workspace.

summary.roleHelp: Backend authorization remains source of truth
summary.integrationsHelp: Nova Poshta/Meta Ads without fake live sync

preferences.title: Profile and appearance
preferences.heading: Language and theme
preferences.description: Change locale and theme with existing controls without changing backend enum values.

attention.title: Safe settings
attention.description: Destructive or secret-related actions are shown only when a real backend flow exists.

workspacePage.title: Workspace
workspacePage.nameHint: Visible to your team inside Sellora.
workspacePage.slugHint: Lowercase Latin letters, numbers and dashes only.
workspacePage.slugError: Slug can contain lowercase Latin letters, numbers and dashes.
workspacePage.timezoneHint: Used for report and operation dates.
workspacePage.safetyDescription: Archive, delete or ownership transfer actions are not shown without real endpoints.
workspacePage.dangerUnavailable: Workspace destructive actions are not available in the current API.

teamPage.title: Team
teamPage.description: Manage user access to your store
teamPage.summaryActiveHelp: Active users in the current API response
teamPage.restricted: You do not have access to manage the team.
teamPage.emptyDescription: Add a manager or analyst to work together in Sellora.
teamPage.addDescription: The current backend creates a user with a temporary password immediately; no email invitation is sent.
teamPage.roleHint: Roles remain backend enums: OWNER, MANAGER, ANALYST.
teamPage.tempPasswordHint: Share this password safely outside Sellora.
teamPage.deactivateDescription: Deactivate access for {email}? Historical records are not deleted.
teamPage.lastOwnerGuard: The last active owner cannot be changed or deactivated.

importCenter.title: Import Center
importCenter.subtitle: Upload, preview, validate, and import historical Excel data safely.
importCenter.productCatalogHelp: This import creates Products, Variants, Inventory and Images from the product catalog template. It does not overwrite existing records.
importCenter.ordersHistoryHelp: This import creates historical orders, order items, customers if needed, and optional shipments. It does not affect current inventory by default.
importCenter.advertisingHistoryHelp: This import creates advertising campaigns and daily metrics from historical ad reports. It does not connect to Meta Ads API.
importCenter.affectInventoryWarning: This may change current stock/reserved quantities. Use only if importing active operational orders.
importCenter.templateHelp: Download the synthetic CSV template, run dry-run, then open Advertising after a successful import.
importCenter.optionalColumns: Recommended columns: Platform, Spend, Messages, Leads, Orders, Revenue, Net Profit, Impressions, Clicks.
importCenter.duplicateHint: Duplicate rows with the same campaign and date must be explained in dry-run: create, update, skip, or warning.
importCenter.afterImport: After a successful import, open Advertising, Dashboard, and Analytics with the same period.

novaPoshta.title: Nova Poshta
novaPoshta.subtitle: Connect delivery directory search and TTN creation.
novaPoshta.credentialHelp: Enter a new credential only when connecting or rotating access. Saved credentials remain masked.
novaPoshta.senderHelp: Nova Poshta TTN creation requires sender references. City and warehouse refs can be searched here; counterparty and contact person refs may require account setup.
novaPoshta.cityHelper: Selecting a city fills Sender city ref.
novaPoshta.warehouseHelper: Selecting a warehouse fills Sender warehouse ref.
novaPoshta.senderWarning: Counterparty and contact person refs are required before TTN creation. Keep these values in Settings → Integrations and rotate the credential if account access changes.
novaPoshta.maskedCredentials: Saved credentials are masked and never displayed raw.
novaPoshta.citySearchFailed: Unable to search Nova Poshta cities. Please try again.
novaPoshta.warehouseSearchFailed: Unable to load warehouses for the selected city.
novaPoshta.selectCityFirst: Select or enter a sender city ref before loading warehouses.
novaPoshta.saveFailed: Unable to save Nova Poshta settings.
novaPoshta.testFailed: Unable to test Nova Poshta connection.
novaPoshta.keyRequired: Add a Nova Poshta API key to enable city search, warehouse search, and TTN creation.
novaPoshta.keepExistingCredential: Keep saved credential or enter a new one
novaPoshta.senderReady: Sender settings are complete. Prepared shipments can create TTNs.
novaPoshta.testSuccess: Nova Poshta is connected. The credential works correctly.
novaPoshta.minCityQuery: Enter at least 2 characters to search cities.
novaPoshta.statusSyncNote: Automatic delivery status updates are not fully connected yet; use manual sync when it is available for the TTN.
novaPoshta.ttnCreated: Nova Poshta TTN was created and saved on the shipment.
novaPoshta.duplicateTtn: This shipment already has a TTN. Duplicate creation is blocked.
novaPoshta.ttnFailed: Unable to create TTN. Check sender settings and the Nova Poshta API key.
novaPoshta.senderSettingsIncomplete: Sender settings are incomplete. Fill city, warehouse, counterparty, contact person, and phone in Settings → Integrations.
novaPoshta.notConfigured: Nova Poshta is not configured. Add a credential and sender settings in Settings → Integrations.
novaPoshta.statusSynced: Delivery status synced from Nova Poshta.
novaPoshta.statusSyncUnavailable: Unable to sync Nova Poshta status. The service may be temporarily unavailable.
novaPoshta.keySavedMasked: The key is saved and hidden for security.
novaPoshta.apiKeyMissing: Nova Poshta key is not saved.
novaPoshta.apiKeyInvalid: Unable to verify the Nova Poshta API key.
novaPoshta.senderSettingsRequiredBeforeTtn: Fill sender settings before creating a TTN.

errors.deleteFailed: This record cannot be deleted in its current state.

emptyStates.products: Add products manually or import a catalog to start selling and reporting.
emptyStates.orders: Create an order or import historical orders to see revenue and profit.
emptyStates.customers: Add customers or import order history to build customer profiles.
emptyStates.leads: Create leads from Instagram conversations before converting them to customers.
emptyStates.inventory: Inventory appears after products and variants have stock rows.
emptyStates.advertising: Add manual advertising metrics to understand ROAS and customer acquisition costs.
emptyStates.analytics: Analytics becomes useful after orders, products, customers and advertising data exist.

mobile.applyHint: Date fields stack on mobile to keep Apply and Cancel visible.

demoData.title: Synthetic demo dataset
demoData.description: Use only generated DEMO records for staging and sales demos.

migration.title: Migration safety
migration.description: Imports are workspace-scoped, dry-run first, and duplicate-aware.

analyticsVerification.title: Analytics verification
analyticsVerification.description: After import, verify Dashboard, Sales, Products, Advertising, Customers, Inventory and Insights.

demoWorkspace.title: Synthetic demo data
demoWorkspace.description: This workspace uses generated DEMO data so pilot users can explore Sellora without exposing real customer, order, advertising, or spreadsheet data.

onboarding.title: First-run setup checklist
onboarding.description: Use these steps to prepare Sellora for a real Instagram shop. Completed steps are detected from available workspace data where it is safe to do so.

products.title: Add or import products
products.description: Create products manually or import a catalog before creating reliable orders.

orders.title: Add customers or order history
orders.description: Create orders or import safe historical orders so Dashboard and reports become useful.

advertising.title: Add advertising metrics
advertising.description: Enter manual Meta Ads metrics to review spend, revenue, ROAS, CPA and CPL.

integrations.title: Configure Nova Poshta
integrations.description: Open integration settings before testing shipment workflows with a real carrier.

analytics.title: Review Dashboard and Analytics
analytics.description: Check revenue, top products, customers, inventory alerts and business insights.

empty.title: No business data yet
empty.description: Add products, orders and advertising metrics or run a dry-run import to turn Sellora into a useful workspace.

importHelp.title: How imports work for pilot users
importHelp.dryRun: Dry-run only checks the file and does not save business data.
importHelp.warnings: Warnings mean rows may need attention but the import can often continue.
importHelp.errors: Errors mean affected rows cannot be imported until the file or mapping is fixed.
importHelp.duplicates: Duplicates are detected by safe keys and skipped by default unless a future update mode is added.
importHelp.nextAction: After a successful dry-run, execute the import and then review Dashboard, Analytics and the source module.
importHelp.productColumns: Expected catalog columns include product name/SKU, variant SKU or color/size, price, stock, minimum stock, category and image URL when available.
importHelp.successNextDescription: If the counters look correct, execute the import, then check products, orders, advertising and analytics for the imported records.

pilotReadiness.title: Pilot readiness
pilotReadiness.description: Sellora is ready for guided pilot testing with synthetic demo data and safe spreadsheet dry-runs.

pilotDocs.title: Pilot documentation
pilotDocs.description: Use the pilot onboarding guide, demo script and QA checklist for first-store feedback.

form.title: Report an issue or share feedback
form.description: Tell us what blocked you, what was confusing, or what would make Sellora more useful for your shop.
form.messagePlaceholder: Describe what happened or what you expected.
form.privacyHint: Do not include passwords, API keys, tokens, or private customer data in your message.

success.submitted: Thanks — your feedback was submitted for review.

errors.submitFailed: Unable to submit feedback. Please try again or tell the pilot contact.
errors.loadFailed: Unable to load feedback. Please try again.
errors.restrictedDescription: Only workspace owners and managers can review pilot feedback.

management.title: Feedback management
management.description: Review workspace-scoped pilot feedback without exposing internal IDs or secrets. Owners can update status for triage.
management.emptyDescription: Pilot feedback submitted from the topbar will appear here for owners and managers.

pilotFeedback.title: Pilot feedback loop
pilotFeedback.description: Feedback is collected in-app with category, optional rating, message and current page.

preMvpRelease.title: Pre-MVP release checklist
preMvpRelease.description: Use the release checklist before inviting external pilot stores.

knownLimitations.title: Known limitations
knownLimitations.description: Pilot users should understand what is manual or not automated yet.

pilotReleaseNotes.title: Pilot release notes
pilotReleaseNotes.description: Share what is ready, what to test, and what data to avoid during pilot.

supportProcess.title: Support process
supportProcess.description: Triage feedback by severity, communicate fixes, and keep known limitations updated.

emptyStates.noDataDescription: Add orders, products, inventory and advertising metrics to unlock reports.

calendarInput.visibleIcon: Calendar icon is visible in light and dark themes.

metaAds.title: Meta Ads integration foundation
metaAds.subtitle: Sellora is preparing a safe Meta Ads connection without rushing API automation. The current MVP remains powered by manual advertising metrics import.
metaAds.preparing: Meta Ads integration is being prepared.
metaAds.manualImportSupported: Manual advertising metrics import is currently supported.
metaAds.automaticLater: Automatic Meta Ads sync will be added later.
metaAds.safeTokenRule: Raw access tokens, app secrets, ad account IDs, and business IDs are not shown or stored in the frontend.
metaAds.workspaceRule: Future Meta Ads settings must be scoped to the current workspace.
metaAds.ownerRule: Future Meta credential management must remain OWNER-only.
metaAds.notActiveTitle: Meta Ads API is not active yet
metaAds.currentSourceCopy: Sellora currently uses manual entry and CSV import for advertising data.
metaAds.futureSyncCopy: Future Meta Ads sync will help import spend, impressions, clicks, and messages automatically.
metaAds.selloraSideCopy: Orders, revenue, and profit remain Sellora-side data.
metaAds.comingSoonHelp: Meta Ads connection will be available in a future stage.
metaAds.manualCsvProtection: Sellora does not automatically overwrite manual or CSV advertising data.
metaAds.deliveryMetricsOnly: Meta Ads provides spend, impressions, clicks, and messages where available. Orders, revenue, and profit remain Sellora-side business data.
metaAds.demoPreviewTitle: Future sync preview without database writes
metaAds.demoPreviewDescription: This block appears only after a future dev/staging feature gate is enabled and does not start live sync.
metaAds.reviewFlowStep1: OWNER connects Meta Ads in a future stage.
metaAds.reviewFlowStep2: Sellora loads advertising metrics in preview mode.
metaAds.reviewFlowStep3: OWNER sees what will be created, updated, skipped, or needs review.
metaAds.reviewFlowStep4: Sellora does not automatically overwrite manual/CSV data.
metaAds.reviewFlowStep5: OWNER confirms only safe changes in a future apply flow.
metaAds.reviewFlowStep6: Sellora records a sync run after a future confirmed apply run.
metaAds.mockOAuthPrepared: Meta Ads connection is not active yet. A safe mock flow is prepared for future integration, but no real Meta account is connected now.

finance.title: Finance
finance.subtitle: Operational finance view for the shop: revenue, product cost, advertising, shipping, and net profit for the selected period.
finance.netProfitExplanation: Net profit is revenue minus product cost, advertising, shipping, discounts, and refunds.
finance.adSpendManualCsvWarning: Advertising spend currently comes from manual entry or CSV import. Meta Ads API is not active yet.
finance.operationalNotAccounting: Sellora Finance MVP is operational profit analytics, not full accounting or tax reporting.
finance.revenueHelper: Sum of valid orders excluding cancelled and returned orders.
finance.netProfitHelper: Revenue minus COGS, advertising, shipping, and available other expenses.
finance.adSpendHelper: Manual or CSV ad metrics only; live Meta sync is not used.
finance.safeZeroDenominator: When the denominator is zero, Sellora shows — instead of NaN or Infinity.
finance.errorDescription: Check the period or try again.
finance.emptyTitle: No valid orders in this period
finance.emptyDescription: Create or import orders, add product costs, and add advertising metrics to see profit.
finance.dataQualityDescription: Sellora shows warnings when data sources are incomplete or conditional. Unavailable values are displayed as — in the UI.
finance.manualAdjustmentsHelper: Expenses, refunds, discounts, or fees entered manually.
finance.manualAdjustmentsExplanation: Manual expenses and adjustments help account for packaging, fees, refunds, discounts, and other costs more accurately.
finance.adjustmentsDescription: Add manual expenses, refunds, discounts, or fees that are not yet available from orders or integrations.
finance.adjustmentsReadOnly: You can view adjustments, but create and edit access is limited to OWNER or MANAGER.
finance.adjustmentSaveError: Could not save the adjustment. Check the fields and try again.
finance.adjustmentsEmpty: No manual expenses or adjustments for this period yet.
finance.breakdownDescription: Shows where profit is lost: COGS, advertising, shipping, manual expenses, refunds, discounts, and fees.
finance.adjustmentsLoadError: Could not load adjustments. Please try again.
finance.expenseStructure: COGS, ads, shipping, other and manual adjustments.

accountMenu.emptyWorkspace: You do not have a workspace yet. Create your first shop to start using Sellora.
accountMenu.emptyWorkspaceTitle: You do not have a workspace yet.
accountMenu.emptyWorkspaceDescription: Create your first shop to start using Sellora.
